name: Missing XML Validation
description: The product accepts XML input from untrusted sources without validating it against a proper schema (DTD, XSD), allowing malformed or malicious XML structures to reach application logic and potentially trigger parsing errors, injection, or logic flaws.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[xml_input] flows to TRANSFORM[xml_parser] without a CONTROL[schema_validation] node that validates the XML structure against a defined schema (DTD, XSD, RELAX NG) before the parsed data is used in application logic
